failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  id AS profile_id,
  username,
  biography
FROM profile,
     to_tsquery('english', 'vegan') AS query
WHERE biography_lexemes @@ query
ORDER BY ts_rank(biography_lexemes, query) DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.biography
FROM profile p

WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ query
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, query) DESC
LIMIT 10;
